title: Smoky Teriyaki Stir-Fry
description: A flavorful and savory Japanese-inspired stir-fry dish, featuring smoky flavors and tender vegetables.

ingredients.name: smoky stir-fry oil
ingredients.notes: Smoked sesame oil or other flavored oil

instructions: Heat the stir-fry oil in a large skillet or wok over medium-high heat.
Add the ginger and cook for 1 minute, until fragrant.
Add the diced tomato and cook for 2-3 minutes, until tender.
Add the smoked salmon and cook for 2-3 minutes, until cooked through.
Stir in the stir-fry sauce and cook for an additional minute.
Season with soy sauce to taste.
Garnish with green onions and sesame seeds.
Serve immediately over steamed rice or noodles.
